codes.title: Main Balance
codes.details: Main balance, voice, SMS and mobile data resources, plus the phone line validity period.

codes.title: Data Plan
codes.details: Remaining balance and validity of the purchased mobile data plan. Does not include bonus data.

codes.title: Bonuses & USD Plans
codes.details: Everything related to promotional top-up bonuses: minutes (MIN), messages (SMS), credit ($) and data (GB/MB/KB). Also shows extra 4G data (Datos.LTE), national browsing data (Datos.cu) and plans in USD.

codes.title: Voice Plan
codes.details: Remaining credit and validity of the purchased voice plan.

codes.title: SMS Plan
codes.details: Remaining credit and validity of the purchased SMS plan.

codes.title: Friends Plan Status
codes.details: Status of the Plan Amigos (Friends Plan), if you have requested it.

codes.title: Postpaid Balance
codes.details: All-in-one balance query for postpaid and institutional accounts: calls, SMS and internet.

codes.title: Mobile Data Availability
codes.details: Check whether your line can connect through mobile data in Cuba.

codes.title: Purchase Menu
codes.details: Interactive menu to buy services: 1) Data, 2) SMS, 3) Voice, 4) Friends Plan, 5) Bundles (Data + Voice + SMS).

codes.title: Recharge with Card
codes.details: Manually recharge your balance with a scratch card bought from a Telecommunications Agent or an ETECSA office. Enter the card number.

codes.title: Recharge by Call
codes.details: Call this number and follow the voice instructions to recharge your balance.

codes.title: Transfer Menu
codes.details: Interactive menu with three options: 1) Balance transfer, 2) Change the transfer PIN, 3) Adelanta Saldo (advance credit) service.

codes.title: Customer Service
codes.details: Call this number for support, questions, or to activate voicemail on your phone.

codes.title: Collect Call
codes.details: The person receiving the call pays. Useful when you need to call and have no balance.

codes.title: Private Call
codes.details: Hide your caller ID by prefixing the number you want to call. The other person will not see who is calling.

codes.title: Show IMEI
codes.details: Display the IMEI code of your phone.

codes.title: Voicemail
codes.details: Call this number to access your voicemail inbox.
